rdf:Description.dcterms:bibliographicCitation: Anderson, J, 1996., The political power of connoisseurship in nineteenth-century Europe: Wilhelm von Bode versus Giovanni Morelli., In Kennerschaft: Kolloquium zum 150sten Geburtstag von Wilhelm von Bode, Jahrbuch der Berliner Museen; N.F., 38,, pp. 107-119.
rdf:Description.dcterms:title: The political power of connoisseurship in nineteenth-century Europe: Wilhelm von Bode versus Giovanni Morelli.
